title: Visualizing the Rank-Nullity Theorem
description: A diagram showing the mapping of a vector space V to a vector space W via a linear transformation T, illustrating the dimensions of the kernel (null space) and image (range), and how their sum equals the dimension of V.
elements: Kernel (Null Space) of T, dim = nullity(T)
relationships: T maps all vectors in V to W
V is partitioned into the Kernel and a complement space
The complement space is isomorphic to the Image
